me.spotlight: QA Automation Engineer with a few years in the software industry, specializing in Playwright and TypeScript automation testing

about.details: QA Automation Engineer with a strong foundation in manual testing and growing expertise in automated testing using Playwright and TypeScript. I focus on building reliable test coverage, identifying bugs early, documenting clear evidence, and improving the quality of software products across web applications and APIs. I also have experience with REST and SOAP API testing, stress testing with JMeter, and dynamic application security testing (DAST) with OWASP ZAP, along with exposure to SAST concepts. I am a proactive learner with strong analytical and problem-solving skills, always looking for ways to make testing processes more efficient, maintainable, and valuable for the team.

certifications.name: QA automation with Playwright and TypeScript

hobbies: Fighting games enthusiast who enjoys continuous learning, especially around QA automation and AI-assisted testing workflows to improve speed and efficiency.

experiences.name: Mid Manual QA Tester
experiences.missionShort: Executing manual testing across mobile, API, regression, smoke, and functional testing workflows
missionLong: Executing manual testing across mobile, API, regression, smoke, and functional testing workflows
I perform manual quality assurance activities focused on validating product behavior across mobile applications, APIs, and different testing scenarios to support reliable software delivery.

My main mission is to execute test cases, validate tickets, document issues clearly, provide test evidence, perform regression and smoke testing, and collaborate with the team to improve testing processes and product quality.

experiences.name: QA Automation Engineer
experiences.missionShort: Creating test cases, documenting evidence, and executing automation and manual testing
missionLong: Creating test cases, documenting evidence, and executing automation and manual testing
I tested software developed by our team, ensuring quality across a variety of applications for diverse clients.

My main mission was to write test cases, document defects, perform automation and manual testing, conduct stress and API testing, and create detailed documentation and evidence based on test results. I also provided UX/UI and logic improvement suggestions when defects or usability issues could affect the client experience.

experiences.name: QA Tester
experiences.missionShort: Creating test cases, documenting defects, and executing manual testing
missionLong: Creating test cases, documenting defects, and executing manual testing
I tested software and hardware products developed for aquaculture solutions, including websites, mobile applications, and related systems.
My main mission was to write test cases, document defects, perform manual and automation testing, and provide UX/UI improvement suggestions for both hardware and software products.

experiences.name: Project Manager
missionLong: I worked as a Project Manager on a mobility solution for Alamo Rent a Car, focused on allowing users to book and drive vehicles without visiting a physical office.

My main mission was to coordinate with the development team, validate that the solution met Alamo standards for the Mexican market, install proprietary hardware, test client and administrator software, and create Jira tickets to track issues through completion.
missions: Installation of proprietary hardware required for the service

experiences.name: Software Analyst (CMMI) & Web Developer Trainee
missionLong: I worked as a Software Analyst, implementing CMMI best practices to help development teams understand process improvements and optimize proprietary software development. I was also given the opportunity to develop websites using WordPress as the backend with custom frontend work.
missions: Creation of Websites powered by Wordpress

experiences.name: Data Capturer
experiences.missionShort: Inventory management, reporting, and creation of product shipping labels
missionLong: Inventory management, reporting, and creation of product shipping labels

I worked as a Data Capturer, ensuring daily product inventory was accurately registered in the system and matched the physical frozen stock. I was also responsible for creating product labels with name, weight, and expiration date information.
